text: Did you know octopuses can rewrite their own genetic messages? They can perform A-to-I RNA editing, transforming their neural transcripts on the fly. But hold on, this isn't DNA rewriting! Research from scientists like Rosenthal and Liscovitch-Brauer shows these edits enhance their adaptability. This RNA editing helps octopuses thrive in different environments, reacting to challenges in real-time. It’s an evolutionary trade-off, balancing complexity with survival. Incredible, right? Curious about more weird science? Hit follow for more!
